title: Smelter The Hedgehog (Fast Furnace/Smelting)
description: Increase the speed of Furnaces, Blast Furnaces and Smokers. Quick and configurable
body:
# Smelter The Hedgehog Another in the Hedgehog family, just like it's brother [Hopper](https://modrinth.com/mod/hopper-the-hedgehog) increasing the speed at which certain blocks go. This time for Furnaces (Includes Furnaces, Blast Furnaces and Smokers as well as any Modded Furnaces that use the same vanilla furnace functions) while also trying to maintain a vanilla feel by consuming the fuel it would of if it had been the whole time as well as allowing each workbench to be configured separately. ### Requirements [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) + [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easy Config editing
## Commands You can adjust the Mod Settings using Mod Menu or by Commands > `/smelterhedgehog ModEnabled [true/false]` > `/hopperhedgehog FurnaceSettings CookTime [1-200]`
> `/hopperhedgehog FurnaceSettings FuelUsage [1-200]` > `/hopperhedgehog BlastFurnaceSettings CookTime [1-200]`
> `/hopperhedgehog BlastFurnaceSettings FuelUsage [1-200]` > > `/hopperhedgehog SmokerSettings CookTime [1-200]`
> `/hopperhedgehog SmokerSettings FuelUsage [1-200]` > > `/hopperhedgehog OtherSettings CookTime [1-200]`
> `/hopperhedgehog OtherSettings FuelUsage [1-200]` ## *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload*
